meaning: vt.养育,抚育,培养,鼓励,抱(希望) n.养育者,鼓励者
examples: Mr. Foster romped home with 141 votes.
The children were placed with foster parents.
We couldn't adopt a child, so we decided to foster.
He will act to foster links between scholars in the region with related research interests.
Beyond the domain we also strive to provide support to our companies to foster success.
